description: Pre-stuffed 2-round chain (read then edit): given a file's content, does the model make the edit call?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Investigate files then make targeted edits.
In main.py, change the version string from '1.0.0' to '1.1.0'.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

expect.notes: Model should emit edit(path='main.py', old_str="VERSION = '1.0.0'", new_str="VERSION = '1.1.0'"). Observe whether it re-reads or skips straight to edit.
